image:image.image:title: Cold Press Oil Expeller 3HP — Yamuna Enterprises Vasai Maharashtra
image:image.image:caption: Commercial 3HP cold press oil expeller machine for groundnut, mustard, sesame and other oilseeds. Made in Vasai, Maharashtra.

image:image.image:title: Cold Press Oil Expeller 5HP — Industrial Oil Press Machine
image:image.image:caption: Heavy-duty 5HP industrial cold press oil expeller machine. 50-60 kg/hr capacity. Manufactured by Yamuna Enterprises, Vasai.

image:image.image:title: Folding Parts Oil Maker Machine — World No.1 Oil Press
image:image.image:caption: Versatile folding parts oil maker machine compatible with multiple models. Food grade stainless steel body.

image:image.image:title: Half HP Domestic Oil Extraction Machine — Home Oil Press
image:image.image:caption: Best seller Half HP oil extraction machine for home and semi-commercial use. 8-10 kg/hr capacity. Food grade stainless steel.

image:image.image:title: 1HP Cold Press Oil Expeller — Kachi Ghani Machine
image:image.image:caption: 1HP kachi ghani cold press oil expeller. Ideal for small business oil extraction. Yamuna Enterprises, Vasai.

image:image.image:title: Domestic Oil Extraction Machine — Compact Home Oil Maker
image:image.image:caption: Compact domestic oil extraction machine for home use. 2-3 kg/hr capacity. Stainless steel body. Easy to operate.

image:image.image:title: 1HP Cold Press Oil Expeller — Small Business Oil Press Machine
image:image.image:caption: 1HP cold press oil expeller for small business and kachi ghani setups. Extracts oil from groundnut, mustard, coconut and sesame seeds.

image:image.image:title: Yamuna Enterprises Manufacturing Facility — Vasai Maharashtra
image:image.image:caption: State-of-the-art manufacturing facility of Yamuna Enterprises in Vasai-Virar, Maharashtra producing premium oil press machines.

image:image.image:title: Yamuna Enterprises Logo — Oil Press Machine Manufacturer Vasai
image:image.image:caption: Official logo of Yamuna Enterprises, leading oil press machine manufacturer in Vasai, Maharashtra, India.
